# services.ntfy-sh

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.ntfy-sh`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.ntfy-sh.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable [ntfy-sh](https://ntfy.sh), a push notification service. |
| `services.ntfy-sh.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a file containing extra ntfy environment variables in the systemd `EnvironmentFile` format. Refer to the [documentation](https://docs.ntfy.sh/config/) for config options. This can be used to pass secrets such as creating declarative users or token without putting them in the Nix store. |
| `services.ntfy-sh.group` | `string` | Primary group of ntfy-sh user. |
| `services.ntfy-sh.package` | `package` | The ntfy-sh package to use. |
| `services.ntfy-sh.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Configuration for ntfy.sh, supported values are [here](https://ntfy.sh/docs/config/#config-options). |
| `services.ntfy-sh.settings.base-url` | `string` | Public facing base URL of the service This setting is required for any of the following features: - attachments (to return a download URL) - e-mail sending (for the topic URL in the email footer) - iOS push notifications for self-hosted servers (to calculate the Firebase poll_request topic) - Matrix Push Gateway (to validate that the pushkey is correct) |
| `services.ntfy-sh.user` | `string` | User the ntfy-sh server runs under. |
